verses.text: 'Blessed is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is covered,' the man in whom God counts no guile. Forgiveness is the truest happiness. To be pardoned and have a sincere heart is a blessing the world cannot give.

'Blessed is he whose transgression is forgiven, whose sin is covered,' the man in whom God counts no guile. Forgiveness is the truest happiness. To be pardoned and have a sincere heart is a blessing the world cannot give.

While David kept silent about his sin, his bones wasted and God's hand lay heavy on him day and night. Unconfessed sin festers within. The misery of hiding guilt is itself a mercy that drives us to confess.

While David kept silent about his sin, his bones wasted and God's hand lay heavy on him day and night. Unconfessed sin festers within. The misery of hiding guilt is itself a mercy that drives us to confess.
When he acknowledged his sin and hid it no longer, God forgave the iniquity of his sin. Confession opened the floodgate of pardon. The moment we own our guilt to God, He is ready to forgive it.

For this every godly one should pray, finding God a hiding place who preserves from trouble and surrounds with songs of deliverance. Pardon makes God our refuge. The forgiven soul shelters gladly in the God who saved it.

For this every godly one should pray, finding God a hiding place who preserves from trouble and surrounds with songs of deliverance. Pardon makes God our refuge. The forgiven soul shelters gladly in the God who saved it.

God promises to instruct and guide with His eye, urging us not to be like the senseless horse or mule needing bit and bridle. Willing obedience is better than forced. Love learns God's way; only the stubborn must be reined in by hard means.

God promises to instruct and guide with His eye, urging us not to be like the senseless horse or mule needing bit and bridle. Willing obedience is better than forced. Love learns God's way; only the stubborn must be reined in by hard means.

Many sorrows attend the wicked, but mercy surrounds the one who trusts the LORD; so let the righteous be glad and shout for joy. Two portions are set before us. Trust draws a circle of mercy that the wicked never know.

Many sorrows attend the wicked, but mercy surrounds the one who trusts the LORD; so let the righteous be glad and shout for joy. Two portions are set before us. Trust draws a circle of mercy that the wicked never know.
